recommendations.title: Secret Admirer
recommendations.overview: An anonymous love letter left in Michael Ryan's locker on the last day of school wreaks havoc on his life and the lives of everyone who comes in contact with it.

recommendations.title: The Gingerdead Man
recommendations.overview: An evil yet adorable Gingerbread man comes to life with the soul of a convicted killer, and this real life cookie monster wreaks havoc on the girl who sent the killer to the electric chair.

recommendations.title: Meet the Leroys
recommendations.overview: A man takes his wife and their teenage children on a road trip down memory lane while facing divorce.

recommendations.title: Becky
recommendations.overview: A teenager's weekend at a lake house with her father takes a turn for the worse when a group of convicts wreaks havoc on their lives.

recommendations.title: The Party
recommendations.overview: A thirteen-year-old French girl deals with moving to a new city and school in Paris, while at the same time her parents are getting a divorce.

recommendations.title: The Parent Trap
recommendations.overview: Two identical twin sisters, separated at birth by their parents' divorce, are reunited years later at a summer camp, where they scheme to bring their parents back together. The girls, one of whom has been living with their mother and the other with t

recommendations.title: The Curse of Bridge Hollow
recommendations.overview: A Halloween-hating dad reluctantly teams up with his teenage daughter when an evil spirit wreaks havoc by making their town's decorations come to life.

recommendations.title: Black Sabbath
recommendations.overview: Three tales of supernatural horror include a woman plagued by threatening phone calls, a family targeted by vampiric monsters, and a deceased medium who wreaks havoc upon the living.

recommendations.title: Frankenweenie
recommendations.overview: When young Victor's pet dog Sparky (who stars in Victor's home-made monster movies) is hit by a car, Victor decides to bring him back to life the only way he knows how. But when the bolt-necked "monster" wreaks havoc and terror in the hearts of Victo

recommendations.title: Hell Baby
recommendations.overview: After she and her husband move into a haunted house, a woman gives birth to a demonic infant that wreaks havoc.
